subject: Biology
content: Lecture Notes - Important! Study of heredity. Gregor Mendel discovered dominant and recessive traits using pea plants. Punnett squares predict genotype outcomes. Professor emphasized this heavily.

subject: Literature
content: Lecture Notes - Important! Features a noble protagonist with a fatal flaw (hamartia) leading to their downfall. Examples include Hamlet and Macbeth. Professor emphasized this heavily.

subject: History
content: Review before Friday's quiz. Triggered by the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand in 1914. Featured trench warfare and ended with the Treaty of Versailles. Make sure to read chapter text.

content: Lecture Notes - Important! Transition to new manufacturing processes in Europe and the US (1760-1840). Shifted agrarian economies to industrial powerhouses. Professor emphasized this heavily.

content: Study Guide: Begot by financial crisis and social inequality in 1789. Led to the rise of Napoleon Bonaparte and the end of absolute monarchy. (Note: check textbook diagrams for clarification).
